name: Molasses Ginger Slice and Bake Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Water or apple cider vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. When warm, brush dough with lemon juice and powdered sugar glaze.
3. Cut four 14x12 pieces of waxed paper or plastic wrap; set aside.
4. In a large bowl, cream margarine or shortening and sugar until smooth.
5. In another bowl, combine baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, allspice, and flour.
6. Gradually mix in water or apple cider vinegar and molasses into the sugar mixture.
7. Blend in the dry ingredients until well combined.
8. Divide dough into four equal pieces.
9. Shape each piece into an 8-to-10-inch roll.
10. Wrap each roll in one piece of waxed paper or plastic wrap.
11. Place wrapped rolls in a plastic freezer container with a tight-fitting lid, or wrap airtight in a 14x12 piece of heavy-duty foil.
12. Label with date and contents.
13. Store in the freezer for up to 6 months.
14. Yield: 4 rolls of dough or about 12 dozen cookies (Molasses-Ginger Cookies in Part 2).
